callback.openAppDesc: Continue in the NeuroDual app to finish signing in.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

toast.emailSentDesc: Check your inbox to reset your password.
toast.accountCreatedDesc: Check your email to confirm your account.

errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use
errors.emailTakenWithHint: This email is already in use. Sign in or reset your password.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.leakedPassword: This password has been found in a data breach. Please choose a different, more unique password.
errors.profileLoadFailed: Unable to load your profile after multiple attempts. Please sign in again.
errors.oauthRedirectMissingUrl: OAuth redirect failed (missing URL). Please try again.
errors.oauthAccountNotLinked: This Google/Apple account isn't linked to your NeuroDual profile. If you previously created an account with email/password, sign in with those instead.
errors.profileMissing: Signed in, but profile not found. Please try again or sign in again.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a link

resetPassword.linkExpiredDesc: This link has expired. Request a new reset link.
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.title: New password

deleteAccount.description: This action is irreversible. Your account and all your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.title: Delete your account

deleteData.description: This action is irreversible. Your history and stats will be deleted from this device.
deleteData.keptDesc: Your account remains active (if you have one)
deleteData.successDesc: Your local data has been deleted.
deleteData.title: Delete my data
